status_note: Initial baseline created alongside the post-cognition Supabase rewire (CR-update-tracker-supabase-wiring-05). No live agent runs against the new prompt yet — first scoreable run is gated on re-provisioning via scripts/provision-ma-agents.ts --skill update-tracker --update-existing. All minScores are set to 0 (the rubric's fail threshold) so the harness executes without rejecting the baseline. Raise per-axis mins after the first accepted run.

maintenance.on_criteria_edit: bump spec_version.commit to the new commit hash of the criteria file
maintenance.on_baseline_edit: bump updatedAt; flip axisStatus entries to 'baselined' as each axis gets a real floor
maintenance.on_axis_add_or_remove: keep minScores, axisStatus, and the rubric's axes list in lockstep — the runner's passesBaseline iterates minScores directly
